song.title: What He Is
song.presentation: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7 V7b
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D What He is: He’s the Father. . G D He’s the everlasting Father. . G D He’s the Firstborn of creation. . Em G He’s the One who lives inside of me. . D A D He’s the Father! Wonderful!
[V2] What He is: He’s the river. He’s the mighty flowing river. He waters me in a desert land. He’s my hiding place; He is our man. He’s the river! Wonderful!
[V3] What He is: He’s the vine tree. He’s the branch the root of Jesse. He’s the tree of life: we have the right To eat of Him and have His life. He’s the vine tree! Wonderful!
[V4] What He is: He’s the Shepherd. He’s the lamb of God, the he-goat. We rest and feed in the pasture land. We strike the blood and eat the lamb. He’s the Shepherd! Wonderful!
[V5] What He is: He’s the Spirit. He’s the all-inclusive Spirit. He’s our everything; He’s our all in all. He gives life to us whene’er we call. He’s the Spirit! Wonderful! .. .. .. --- [V6] What He is: He’s a Person. He’s a real and living Person. He is living now inside of us. This person is so glorious. He’s a Person! Wonderful!
[V7] What He is: He’s the Body; He’s the fullness of the Godhead; He’s the center of the Father’s plan, Christ, and the church, the one new man. He is wonderful, wonderful.|
[V7b] He is wonderful, wonderful. He is wonderful, wonderful.
